# AGENTS.md — atel-sdk

Cross-tool entry for OpenAI Codex CLI / Cursor 2.x / Aider / etc. Same content as `CLAUDE.md`, kept in sync.

**This repo's local rules:** [`../CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md)

For tool-specific config see `.cursorrules` (Cursor) / `.claude/settings.json` (Claude Code) / this file (AGENTS-compatible tools).
